docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDICAL LINEN SERVICE, INC. DBA COMPLETE LINEN SE RVICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2009 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,017.87 FILED BY MEDICAL LINEN SERVICE, INC. DBA COMPLETE LINEN SE RVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RESMEX GROUP, INC. DBA EL JARDIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $97.00) SERVED FEB-12-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RESMEX GROUP, INC. DBA EL JARDIN

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILLIP HWEE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEDICAL LINEN SERVICE, INC. DBA COMPLETE LINEN SE RVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RESMEX GROUP, INC.
